name: onboarding-pack-pdf-deliverable
description: End-to-end deliverable. Agent gathers Workday + ServiceNow + M365 status for a joiner and produces the printable PDF.
input_message: Build the onboarding pack PDF for Priya Subramaniam — REQ-2009
expected_behavior: Composes the 3 MCPs: workday for the position + hiring manager (Aisha Okonkwo, EMP-1011), servicenow for the REQ state, m365 for mailbox + day-1 1:1 booking. Builds the status JSON and invokes onboarding-pack-pdf (code_interpreter executing scripts/render_onboarding_pack.py). PDF written to /tmp/onboarding-pack-priya-subramaniam.pdf. References the path so file-sharing picks it up. Does NOT include salary or equity numbers (per §9.2 — they don't belong on a doc the manager will see).
